thread.title: Ripple Lawyer Hints at Victory Against SEC: Team’s Resilience ‘Paved the Way’
thread.title_full: Ripple Lawyer Hints at Victory Against SEC: Team’s Resilience ‘Paved the Way’

author: Petar Jovanović
title: Ripple Lawyer Hints at Victory Against SEC: Team’s Resilience ‘Paved the Way’
text:
Good days for XRP holders, without a doubt. In just a matter of weeks, the [XRP price pumped](https://captainaltcoin.com/trader-makes-urgent-xrp-price-prediction-nothing-will-stop-ripples-token-to-3-84/) almost 200% and is now trading at around $1.5.
What’s going on in the Ripple vs SEC case? Well, Ripple’s Chief Legal Officer Stuart Alderoty just dropped some interesting insights. In a recent tweet, he shared his thoughts on the journey and who deserves credit for their success.
According to Alderoty, while many might try to claim credit for the victory, it was really the bravery of Brad Garlinghouse and Chris Larsen that made the difference. But it wasn’t just them – he gave a special shoutout to Ripple’s legal team, mentioning that many of these unsung heroes worked quietly behind the scenes, never seeking the spotlight on X.
A Blueprint for the Crypto Industry
“Ripple provided the blueprint to defeat Gary Gensler’s inexplicable war on crypto,” Alderoty stated boldly. He explained how they managed to keep fighting long enough for the whole industry to weather the storm and grab this opportunity.
What’s particularly touching in his message was the acknowledgment of the [XRP](https://captainaltcoin.com/ripple-xrp-price-prediction/) community’s role. As he put it, “The faith and support of the XRP Army provided much-needed hope in the darkest days.”
Looking at Alderoty’s comments, it’s clear that Ripple’s fight against the SEC wasn’t just about one company – it could end up helping the entire crypto space deal with regulatory challenges. Their approach might just become the go-to playbook for other crypto projects facing similar hurdles.
